name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BACKLOG-5
title: Rewire _run_enforcement_checks to use contract.lib.checks library API; wire check_numbered_lists at spec-update→test-red
description:
After contract/lib/checks.py library lands (separate backlog), rewire tdd-state-machine to use it:

1. tdd-step.py _run_enforcement_checks: replace subprocess calls to .claude/features/contract/scripts/enforcement/check-*.py with . The 6 currently-wired checks become library calls.

2. Wire check_numbered_lists into the spec-update → test-red transition. Currently check-numbered-lists.py exists but is NOT auto-invoked anywhere. Best invocation point: in tdd-step.py's spec-update→test-red transition handler, after the spec change is committed but before tests run. Catches BOTH spec-skill output AND manual spec edits.

3. Update tdd-state-machine spec.md with invariants for the new wiring.
4. Update contract.md reads.files to declare the library import.
5. Add tests for the new wiring.

DEPENDS ON: contract library extraction backlog must land first.
